name: at-home free energy device

phase_0.boundary_condition: the grounded physical chassis and magnetic containment vessel that defines the system limits and seals the resonant cavity

VINIT.justification: the initial void of uncollapsed quantum fluctuations and ambient radiant energy before any extraction mechanism is engaged

TANCH.justification: the terminal anchor and physical boundary that contains the device, providing the ground reference and structural seal

AFWD.justification: the forward morphism directing harvested vacuum fluctuations into usable DC current for the external load

AREV.justification: the reverse morphism representing the thermodynamic reaction, where the system's extraction induces an opposing electromagnetic force

CLINK.justification: the sequential composition of the continuous loop where resonance, extraction, and phase-shifted feedback chain together

IMSCRIB.justification: the cavity recognizes and maintains its own standing wave frequency, acting as the self-referential core of the device

FSPLIT.justification: the standing wave splits into two distinct paths: energy delivered to the external load and phase-shifted reactive feedback

FFUSE.justification: the fusion of the load extraction and the reactive feedback, restoring and sustaining the original standing wave

EVALT.justification: the affirmative evaluation where overunity is claimed and the external load receives more energy than the input

EVALF.justification: the negative evaluation where system losses, heat dissipation, and Lenz drag dominate, causing the system to stall

ENGAGR.justification: the B-state where the device is simultaneously modeled as an infinite vacuum tap (open) and a closed thermodynamic system bound by conservation laws, held without resolution

IFIX.justification: the irreversible ROM fixation of the magnetic topology and physical geometry, locking the device into its operational state

phase_3.void_description: unharvested ambient vacuum, no extraction, zero potential difference, device at rest
phase_3.true_description: overunity achieved, net-positive energy delivered to external load, system in steady-state oscillation
phase_3.false_description: thermodynamic stall, back-EMF dominates, system acts as a brake and dissipates energy as heat
phase_3.both_description: the structural paradice of the device: simultaneously drawing from an infinite vacuum and bound by local conservation laws, held without resolution

steps.domain_action: unharvested zero-point vacuum — the initial void of uncollapsed quantum fluctuations before extraction
grounded physical chassis — the terminal anchor defining the physical boundary and ground reference
self-sustaining resonant identity — the cavity establishes and recognizes its own standing wave frequency
resonant field bifurcation — the standing wave splits into two distinct operational paths
forward radiant energy extraction — the T-arm morphism delivering harvested power to the external load
net-positive load delivery — the affirmative evaluation where overunity is successfully claimed
reactive back-EMF and Lenz drag — the F-arm morphism representing the opposing thermodynamic reaction
thermodynamic entropy dump — the negative evaluation of system losses, heat, and drag
phase-recombined resonant field — the fusion of load extraction and reactive feedback restoring the standing wave
cyclic resonance-extraction chain — the sequential composition of the continuous operational loop
open-closed system paradice — the B-state where the device is both an infinite vacuum tap and a closed thermodynamic system
permanent magnetic bias lock — the irreversible ROM fixation of the magnetic topology and physical geometry
sealed device boundary — the final closure and containment of the physical apparatus

phase_5.compiler_frontend: the physical geometry, winding ratios, and magnetic alignments that translate vacuum fluctuations into resonant modes
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: electromagnetic induction and phase-shifted feedback loops connecting the cavity to the load
phase_5.memory_mechanism: the persistent magnetic field of the permanent magnets and the Q-factor of the resonant cavity
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: the natural resonant frequency and the speed-of-light phase-delays governing the feedback loop
phase_5.alfs_store: the ambient zero-point field and the Earth's geomagnetic baseline serving as the infinite energy source

phase_6.pre_cycle_state: ambient vacuum state with device at rest
phase_6.post_cycle_state: ambient vacuum state with device in steady-state oscillation
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the device claims to operate as a topological invariant, extracting work without erasing information, treating the vacuum as an infinite thermal bath with zero entropy cost.

  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [9] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (cyclic resonance-extraction chain — the sequential composition of the continu...)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑱 𐑭)  -- [10] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (open-closed system paradice — the B-state where the device is both an infinit...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑳 𐑡)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (permanent magnetic bias lock — the irreversible ROM fixation of the magnetic ...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [12] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (sealed device boundary — the final closure and containment of the physical ap...)

noncomputable def at_home_free_energy_device_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
